description_long: This is a medium-sized, trapezoidal wooden bookcase with four evenly spaced horizontal shelves and an open back. The bookcase is constructed from a warm brown wood, giving it a sturdy and classic appearance suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments. The sides of the bookcase taper slightly inward from bottom to top, creating a subtle geometric profile. All shelves are open and unobstructed, providing ample space for storing books, decorative items, or other objects. The back and sides are solid, while the front is fully open for easy access. The overall finish is matte, with a smooth but not glossy surface texture.
description: A brown, trapezoidal wooden bookcase with four open shelves and a matte finish. Its sides taper inward, giving it a modern, geometric look.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the full depth of the bookcase.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the inward-tapered profile and solid side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the tapered profile and solid side panel.
